description: Scenario catalogue for CLI-level workflows and observable outcomes.

scenarios.objective: Generate output files from a sample BibTeX input and a sample template.
expected_outcomes: The command exits successfully.
Output files are created in the target directory.
Generated content matches the expected rendered output for the fixture set.

scenarios.objective: Verify that dry-run mode reports intended outputs without writing files.
expected_outcomes: The command exits successfully.
The console output lists intended output file names and related entry keys.
No output files are created.

scenarios.objective: Verify overwrite and non-overwrite behaviour for existing output files.
expected_outcomes: With --overwrite, existing files are replaced without prompting.
Without --overwrite, existing files are not replaced and a warning is emitted for each skipped file.

scenarios.objective: Verify that supported file naming strategies produce the expected output names.
expected_outcomes: The uuid7 strategy generates stable, valid file names for the fixture expectations.
The slugify strategy generates valid file names derived from entry keys.

scenarios.objective: Verify that single mode renders one output file for the selected entry set.
expected_outcomes: Exactly one output file is generated.
The output file contains rendered content for the selected entries.
The output file name is derived from the input file name and template file name.

scenarios.objective: Verify that a custom LaTeX substitution map overrides built-in substitutions for the latex_substitute helper.
expected_outcomes: The command exits successfully when the custom substitution map file is provided.
Rendered output applies custom substitutions in preference to built-in defaults.
Without the custom map option, rendered output uses the built-in default substitutions.

scenarios.objective: Verify verbose logging and non-verbose progress behaviour.
expected_outcomes: Verbose mode emits per-entry diagnostic information and a summary.
Non-verbose mode emits progress-oriented output and a summary without detailed per-entry logging.

scenarios.command: transform with invalid input or template
scenarios.objective: Verify that transform fails immediately and reports informative errors for invalid artefacts.
expected_outcomes: The command exits with a failure status.
The reported error message identifies the relevant invalid or missing artefact.

scenarios.objective: Verify correct single-output rendering for a representative large real-world input file.
expected_outcomes: The command exits successfully for the large input fixture.
The generated single output is structurally correct for the selected template.
Processing completes without obvious failure modes associated with dataset size.

scenarios.objective: Verify the default information output when no input file is provided.
expected_outcomes: The command exits successfully.
The output describes the available fields for supported entry types.

scenarios.objective: Verify information output for entry types present in a supplied input file when no entry selection is made.
expected_outcomes: The command exits successfully.
The output describes the available fields for the entry types present in the input file.

scenarios.objective: Verify parsed key-value output for selected entries.
expected_outcomes: The command exits successfully.
The output contains parsed information only for the selected entries.

scenarios.command: info --input with a representative selection on a large dataset
scenarios.objective: Verify representative parsed information output for a large real-world input file using a repeatable selection rule.
expected_outcomes: The command exits successfully for the large input fixture.
The output includes representative parsed key-value information for the selected entries in that file.
